query: I want to build a new task manager web app on Azure. Help me set it up. Org: acme, project: taskapp, GitHub: acme/taskapp.
context: Empty working directory. User has Azure CLI logged in to their subscription and gh CLI authenticated.
expected_behavior: Claude collects org, project, GitHub repo, and asks which optional components are needed (SQL? Storage? Observability?)
Claude generates files matching the per-skill templates/ structure (Bicep, workflows, frontend, api)
Claude then routes to configuring-azure-oidc-for-github-actions to set up SPs + federated credentials for the test and production branches
Claude explicitly mentions that main is for local dev and is NOT connected to an Azure environment
Claude runs applying-azure-cost-guardrails/scripts/audit-sku-overrides.sh on the generated Bicep BEFORE the first deploy
